creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a mailing list "freebsd-status-calls"
https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-status-calls

It exists since December 2021 (or earlier), see
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-status-calls/

However, "freebsd-status-calls" is missing in our mail archive
http://bit0.nyi.freebsd.org/mailarchive/2023/
